Building on the established compute-bound nature of video diffusion models, we demonstrate that each model's energy profile obeys theoretically derived scaling laws, decomposing into quadratic and linear terms whose coefficients directly reflect the underlying architectural complexity. Validated across six open-source models spanning 8.3B-27B parameters and three GPU configurations, this decomposition achieves below 3% MAPE across all architectures. This approach offers a standardized, empirically and theoretically grounded framework for sustainability benchmarking across T2V models and architectures.

</details>


### [436] [SleepBand: Single-Source Domain Generalization for Sleep Staging via Physiologically Structured Spectral Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04851)
*Zhi Lu,Yang Hu,Yan Chen*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 提出SleepBand框架，通过可学习的Morlet滤波器组和整合-重校准管道嵌入振荡先验知识，在单源域泛化设定下实现跨数据集睡眠分期，无需多源域或域标签。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有睡眠分期模型难以泛化到未见数据集，而传统的域泛化方法通常需要多个源域或域标签，这在实践中很少可用。因此需要在更严格且更实用的单源域泛化设定下解决这一问题。

Method: 提出SleepBand框架，包含：(1) 可学习的Morlet滤波器组，用于嵌入振荡先验；(2) 结构化的整合-重校准管道，将表示锚定到域不变的睡眠节律（如慢波、纺锤波），减少对数据集特定伪影的依赖。

Result: 在五个公开数据集上达到单源域泛化的最优性能，并在留一法域泛化（多源）设定下也保持竞争力。学习到的滤波器与经典神经生理学一致，鲁棒性源于聚焦于窄带、生理上有意义的线索。

Conclusion: 基于原则性的、生理学感知的归纳偏置是实现鲁棒单域睡眠分期的有前景路径。

Abstract: Generalizing sleep staging models to unseen datasets is challenging, and typical domain generalization (DG) methods often rely on multiple source domains or domain labels that are rarely available in practice. We tackle the stricter and more practical setting of single-source domain generalization: training on a single labeled source dataset, without domain labels or access to target data. We present SleepBand, a physiology-guided framework that embeds oscillatory priors via a learnable Morlet filter bank and a structured integration-and-recalibration pipeline. This anchors representations to domain-invariant sleep rhythms (e.g., slow waves, spindles), reducing reliance on dataset-specific artefacts. On five public datasets, SleepBand achieves state-of-the-art SDG performance and remains competitive under leave-one-domain-out (multi-source) DG. Analyses show that the learned filters align with canonical neurophysiology and that robustness stems from focusing on narrowband, physiologically meaningful cues. Our results suggest that principled, physiology-aware inductive biases are a promising path for robust single-domain sleep staging. Code is available at https://github.com/lzcn/sleep-band

</details>


<div id='q-fin.TR'></div>

# q-fin.TR [[Back]](#toc)

### [437] [Coordinated Sniper Cohorts on Pump.fun: Detection of 1,012 Persistent Wallet Rings and the Limits of Naive Causal Inference for First-Hour Buyer Flow](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02795)
*Arati Uday Kamat*

Main category: q-fin.TR

TL;DR: 利用Solana pump.fun市场数据，通过两阶段检测流程识别出1,012个持续协同购买的钱包群体。实验表明，虽然这些群体表现出更高的早期购买活动，但因果效应检验显示这主要是选择性偏差导致，而非群体本身的因果作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究去中心化金融(DeFi)市场中是否存在有组织的买方协同行为，以及这种行为对市场流动性的因果影响。

Method: 两阶段检测流程：(1) 发币内首买家窗口提取；(2) 跨发币持续群体发现（基于共现图的并查集）。采用3:1随机匹配设计和活动匹配安慰剂检验进行因果推断。

Result: 识别出1,012个持续钱包群体，153个为高等级。真实群体触发的发币在买家数和SOL流入量上有显著提升，但活动匹配安慰剂组显示出更大的提升效应，否定了群体特异性因果解释。

Conclusion: 观察到的协同购买行为与买家流量提升之间的关联更多是选择效应的结果，而非群体协调的因果作用。要识别因果效应需要基于发币质量协变量的倾向得分匹配。

Abstract: We study coordinated buyer behavior on the Solana pump.fun bonding-curve marketplace using 1,578,333 buyer observations from 166,098 token launches between June 12 and June 26, 2026. A two-stage detection pipeline - intra-launch first-buyer-window extraction followed by cross-launch persistent-cohort surfacing via union-find on co-occurrence graphs - identifies 1,012 persistent wallet cohorts (2 to 12 wallets each, drawn from 2,965 unique addresses) that systematically co-fire as early buyers across multiple launches. 153 qualify as high-tier (>= 10 launches or score >= 100); 22 hit >= 20 launches. The top cohort (9 wallets) appears among the first 10 buyers of 42 distinct launches over 11 days at average first-buyer rank 2.29.
  Under a 3:1 random-matched design, cohort-touched launches show a +132.3% lift in first-30-minute buyer count (95% CI [+127.0, +137.4], n_treated = 5,411) and +136.5% lift in SOL inflow (95% CI [+120.9, +152.2]). An activity-matched placebo drawing wallets matched on per-wallet launch-count yields a LARGER buyer-flow lift of +216.3% (95% CI [+183.8, +255.2]). The real-cohort estimate falls well below the placebo CI lower bound, refuting a strong cohort-specific causal interpretation.
  We interpret the association as evidence of selection: both real cohorts and activity-matched placebos disproportionately appear in the buyer queues of launches attracting elevated buyer flow for reasons orthogonal to coordination. Identifying a cohort-specific causal effect requires propensity-score matching on launch-quality covariates. We release the full cohort catalogue, detection code, and robustness artefacts as RED-COHORT-2026-v1 under CC-BY-4.0.

</details>


### [438] [Pump.fun Graduation Regime Windows: Survival Analysis of 832,941 Token Launches and the Social-Presence Effect](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02823)
*Arati Uday Kamat*

Main category: q-fin.TR

TL;DR: 对832,941个Solana pump.fun代币发行进行生存分析，发现24小时毕业率仅为0.198%，较2025年下降3.18倍。社交媒体渠道和初始市值（反映创作者自购行为）是影响毕业率的关键因素。发布Telegram的发行毕业率高出8.94倍，初始市值高于30 SOL的发行毕业率高出4.51倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量化Solana pump.fun平台上代币发行的毕业率，分析其随时间变化的趋势，并识别影响毕业率的关键因素，特别是社交媒体渠道和创作者自购行为的作用。

Method: 对832,941个Solana pump.fun代币发行进行Kaplan-Meier和Cox比例风险生存分析，观察期为2026年5月8日至6月10日。采用GRW框架进行窗口化比较，计算Wilson 95%置信区间，并使用log-rank检验和Cox回归分析风险比。

Result: 合并毕业率为0.198%（Wilson 95% CI [0.189%, 0.208%]），较2025年下降3.18倍。稳态毕业率为0.207%。有Telegram的发行毕业率1.485%（无Telegram为0.166%，提升8.94倍）；三种社交渠道俱全的发行毕业率1.919%（无社交渠道为0.110%，提升17.4倍）。初始市值>30 SOL的发行毕业率0.634%，Cox风险比4.51。Cox一致性指数0.858。

Conclusion: Solana pump.fun平台代币毕业率显著下降，主要归因于转向零自购代币的趋势，而非自购发行中成功率的下降。社交媒体渠道和创作者自购行为是毕业率的强预测因子。数据集已公开发布。

Abstract: We present a Kaplan-Meier and Cox proportional-hazards survival analysis of 832,941 Solana pump.fun token launches with 24-hour graduation outcomes, observed continuously between 2026-05-08 and 2026-06-10. The pooled graduation rate is 0.198% (Wilson 95% CI [0.189%, 0.208%]), a 3.18x decline from the 0.63% rate reported by Marino et al. (2026) for September-October 2025. After excluding a four-day tracker warm-up and the partial last day, the steady-state rate is 0.207% (Wilson 95% CI [0.198%, 0.218%]). We formalise the windowed comparison as the Graduation Regime Windows (GRW) framework, name our 34-day window the RED-PUMP-2026-v1 regime, and release the 860,213-launch dataset under CC-BY-4.0 on Zenodo at concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20633486. Social-channel presence exerts a large effect: launches advertising Telegram graduate at 1.485% versus 0.166% without (8.94x lift, log-rank p < 1e-300); Cox hazard ratio for Telegram is 5.40 (95% CI [4.73, 6.17], p = 6.6e-138). Launches advertising all three social channels graduate at 1.919% versus 0.110% for launches with none (17.4x lift). Initial market-cap above the 30 SOL platform default, a proxy for creator self-buying, raises the hazard ratio to 4.51; the top quartile (mcap > 31 SOL) graduates at 0.634%, matching the 2025 pooled rate. The cross-regime decline is substantially attributable to a shift toward zero-self-buy tokens rather than a fall in success rate among self-buy launches. Cox concordance is 0.858.

</details>


### [439] [Outcome-Classified Precision Auditing of Filter Rules in Algorithmic DEX Trading: Evidence from 2,400 Rejection Events](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02830)
*Arati Uday Kamat*

Main category: q-fin.TR

TL;DR: 本文对Solana DEX交易中一个生产级过滤器堆栈进行了精确审计，报告了保守的3.7:1的节省与遗漏比，并指出更宽的14.8:1比率未通过匹配比较测试验证，最终结论为保守比率才是生命周期数据支持的可靠结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估生产级过滤器堆栈在Solana DEX交易中的实际效果，验证不同解释框架下的节省与遗漏比率的可靠性。

Method: 对13天窗口期的后拒绝前向市场观测数据进行精确审计，采集99,510个样本（2,402个唯一拒绝事件，涉及8条活跃过滤规则），采用五级结果规则分类，并进行匹配比较测试验证宽口径解释的可靠性。

Result: 保守的测量回撤节省比率为3.7:1，每个活跃过滤器均为正向净收益；宽口径比率（14.8:1）依赖的早期死亡分类在匹配测试中未得到验证：早期死亡mint的消失率为48.9%，非早期死亡拒绝mint的消失率为57.6%。

Conclusion: 宽口径的14.8:1比率未通过匹配比较测试验证，保守的3.7:1是生命周期数据支持的可信报告；方法学贡献在于分离两种证据基础并证明宽口径分类无法通过实证检验。

Abstract: This paper reports a precision audit of a production filter stack against a 13-day window of post-rejection forward-market observations on Solana DEX trading (2026-04-10 to 2026-04-23, UTC). The audit yielded 99,510 follow-up samples across 2,402 unique rejection events spanning eight active filter rules. We classify each event under a five-tier outcome rule and report per-filter distributions. The headline result is the conservative save-to-miss ratio of 3.7 : 1 from windowed measured-drawdown saves alone; every active filter with adequate sample size is individually net-positive. A wider interpretation that credits single-sample-within-60-minute events as saves yields 14.8 : 1. We then test the interpretive premise of that wider tier against the deposited lifecycle data of a separately-published benchmark (RED-2400). The matched comparison shows that early-death-classified mints reach the gone state at 48.9 percent. Non-early-death rejected mints reach gone at 57.6 percent. The early-death classification does not identify tokens at elevated rug-pull risk relative to other rejected tokens. The wider 14.8 : 1 ratio therefore rests on a tier that the matched test does not validate. The conservative 3.7 : 1 is the report the lifecycle data supports. The methodological contribution is the separation of the two evidence bases and the demonstration that the wider tier does not survive matched-comparison testing.

</details>


### [440] [Exact conditional simulation of Point processes: Application to pathwise market impact estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03239)
*Joseph Leclère,Youssef Ouazzani Chahdi,Mathieu Rosenbaum,Grégoire Szymanski*

Main category: q-fin.TR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于条件仿真的方法，通过泊松随机测度的稀疏表示重构反事实价格路径，从而实现对不同交易策略（激进、被动、混合）的市场冲击进行严谨的路径级估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 市场冲击的真实估计受限于反事实路径不可观测的问题，需要在不改变市场随机性的条件下模拟替代策略下的价格路径。

Method: 研究计数过程在扰动强度下的条件仿真：利用稀疏表示（thinning representation）中的潜在泊松随机测度，在给定观测历史下刻画其条件分布，从而生成基于同一随机源的精确事件驱动反事实路径。

Result: 提出了一个精确的、事件驱动的算法，能够重建反事实路径，并适用于激进、被动和混合策略下的市场冲击估计。

Conclusion: 该方法为市场冲击的路径级估计提供了严谨的理论框架和实用算法，克服了反事实不可观测的根本困难。

Abstract: Market impact is defined as the difference between the observed price trajectory under a given execution strategy and the counterfactual trajectory that would have prevailed without it. Since this counterfactual is unobservable, estimating market impact requires simulating alternative paths under the same realized market randomness. We address this by studying the conditional simulation of point processes under perturbed intensities. Given an observed counting process whose intensity is determined by its own history, we characterize the conditional law of the latent Poisson random measure in a thinning representation. This yields an exact, event-driven algorithm that reconstructs counterfactual paths on a common randomness source, enabling rigorous pathwise market impact estimation for aggressive, passive, and mixed strategies.

</details>


### [441] [A Gabor--Epps uncertainty principle for traders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04130)
*Tim Gebbie*

Main category: q-fin.TR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种适用于实际交易的Gabor-Epps不确定性原理，指出高频相关性在时钟时间中无法被充分观察，而需要通过市场活动、订单流重叠和有限耦合响应来解析。由此衍生出六条对做市商频率交易者有用的经验法则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的不确定性原理主要应用于信号处理领域，但高频交易中时钟时间与市场活动时间存在错配，导致对跨资产依赖性的观测存在根本性局限。本文旨在揭示这一局限并给出实用指导。

Method: 从Gabor-Epps不确定性原理出发，将观测窗口划分为日历时间（物理间隔）、交易时间（交易计数间隔）和成交量时间（成交量桶）三种维度，分析不同时间尺度下市场活动定位精度与跨资产依赖稳定性之间的权衡关系。

Result: 发现事件尺度下，对市场活动在时间上的定位越精确，跨资产依赖关系的稳定性就越差；反之，越追求依赖关系的解析，就越会模糊产生该依赖关系的事件时间结构，从而产生显著的时钟风险。

Conclusion: 总结出六条适用于做市商频率交易的经验法则，强调在低于人类平均反应时间的尺度上操作时，必须注意时钟时间与事件时间的根本性矛盾。

Abstract: We propose a Gabor--Epps uncertainty principle for practical trading. The key idea is that high-frequency correlation is not observed in clock time alone, but is resolved through market activity, order-flow overlap, and finite coupling response. This suggests six simple rules of thumb that may be useful to traders and trading programs operating at market-making frequencies, particularly those crossing books and markets below the average human response time. Throughout, the observation window is clock-dependent: in calendar time it is a physical interval, in trade time it is a trade-count interval, and in volume time it is a volume bucket. In summary: at event scales, the more precisely one localises market activity in time, the less well one can resolve stable cross-asset dependence. The more one resolves dependence, the more one has coarse-grained away the event-time structure that generated it. This can generate substantial clock risk.

</details>


### [442] [A Limit Order Market with Uncertain Informed Trading Participation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04221)
*Umut Çetin,Mingwei Lin*

Main category: q-fin.TR

TL;DR: 研究了一个具有随机知情交易者数量的限价订单市场，通过固定点积分方程刻画均衡，发现价格冲击的幂律指数由资产尾部与知情交易者数量的完整分布共同决定，而非仅由期望数量决定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文献通常假设知情交易者的数量是确定的或已知的，但现实中做市商面临知情交易存在性和强度的双重不确定性。本文旨在研究当知情交易者数量随机时，市场均衡如何形成，以及价格冲击行为如何被影响。

Method: 建立了边际成本函数的固定点积分方程来刻画均衡，证明了有界资产价值下均衡的存在性；通过大订单渐近分析推导价格冲击的幂律和对数行为；结合数值实验验证理论结果并拓展比较静态分析。

Result: 有界资产价值且尾部分布为幂律时，价格冲击服从幂律，其指数由资产价值尾部和知情交易者数量的完整分布共同决定，而非仅由期望数量决定；在轻尾情形下价格冲击呈对数形式；数值结果与理论渐近一致。

Conclusion: 知情交易者数量的随机性显著影响价格冲击的形态，传统基于期望数量的简化处理可能遗漏重要信息。本文为理解现实市场中的信息不确定性提供了理论基础。

Abstract: We study a one period limit order market with informed traders, noise traders, and competitive liquidity suppliers, in which the number of informed traders is random. Liquidity suppliers know the distribution of the informed trader count, but not its realization, and therefore face uncertainty about both the presence and the intensity of informed trading. We characterize equilibrium by a fixed point integral equation for the marginal cost function and establish existence of equilibrium for bounded asset values. We then analyse large order asymptotics. For bounded asset values with power law endpoint behaviour, equilibrium price impact follows a power law whose exponent is determined jointly by the asset value tail and the full distribution of the informed trader count. In particular, this exponent is not determined by the expected number of informed traders alone. In the light endpoint regime, price impact is instead logarithmic. Finally, we solve the fixed point numerically across several asset value and informed trader count distributions. The numerical results are consistent with the theoretical asymptotics in the cases covered by the theory and provide comparative statics beyond them.

</details>


<div id='q-fin.ST'></div>

# q-fin.ST [[Back]](#toc)

### [443] [A Spectral Generalisation of the Variance Ratio: Eigenstructure of Long-Horizon Portfolio Covariance and a Multi-Memory Factor Model of U.S. Equity Returns](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03858)
*Anders G Frøseth*

Main category: q-fin.ST

TL;DR: 提出多变量方差比框架，将长期权益收益动态分解为收益通道和波动通道记忆成分，识别出五因子模型，并在多个美国与欧洲投资组合面板上验证，发现波动记忆在1980年代末发生制度转变，且收益与波动通道的截面载荷存在经济意义上的显著差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Lo-MacKinlay方差比仅适用于单变量序列，无法同时刻画横截面中收益与波动率的长期记忆结构；需构建多变量框架以分离收益通道和波动通道的记忆成分。

Method: 提出多变量广义方差比，将长期权益收益动态分解为收益通道和波动通道记忆成分；识别五因子模型（捕捉持久、反持久及多尺度记忆）；使用滚动窗口bootstrap定位制度转变点；进行跨通道beta反向检验。

Result: 五因子模型适用于所有五个面板；美国股权波动记忆在1980年代末发生转变，最慢成分从约2年延长至4年；收益与波动通道的截面载荷在经济上不同，拒绝共享载荷假设（Bonferroni p=0.0004）。

Conclusion: 收益动量模式的特征不能直接预测波动持续性模式，两通道的横截面驱动因素存在显著差异。

Abstract: We propose a multivariate generalisation of the Lo-MacKinlay (1988) variance ratio that decomposes long-horizon equity-return dynamics into separate return-channel and volatility-channel memory components across the cross-section of asset returns. The framework identifies a parsimonious five-factor model - capturing persistent, antipersistent, and multi-scale memory in returns and volatility - that fits four U.S. portfolio panels (the Fama-French 49-industry universe, its pre/post-1998 halves, and the Fama-French 100 size x book-to-market sort) and a European replication (Fama-French Europe 25), recovering seven stylised facts of long-horizon equity dynamics simultaneously across all five panels. Three findings carry economic content. (i) The same five-factor decomposition fits all five panels, indicating a cross-sectional structure robust to industry vs. size-and-value sorts, to sub-periods, and to U.S. vs. developed-European markets. (ii) U.S. equity volatility memory underwent a regime transition in the late 1980s - not at the static 1998 split-half boundary - with the slowest component of the volatility cascade lengthening from approximately two to four years; a 1000-replicate rolling-window bootstrap localises the transition with strictly non-overlapping 90% confidence bands separating pre- and post-transition windows. (iii) The cross-sectional loadings driving return-channel long memory are economically distinct from those driving volatility-channel cascade memory: a cross-channel beta-inversion test finds no panel with the positive alignment a single shared loading predicts, rejecting the shared-loading hypothesis toward anti-alignment on the two largest panels at Bonferroni p = 0.0004. Characteristics that predict return-momentum patterns therefore need not predict volatility-persistence patterns.

</details>


### [444] [Forecasting Realized Volatility with Time Series Foundation Models: A Comparison with Econometric Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05291)
*Alessio Brini*

Main category: q-fin.ST

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了9种预训练时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）与8种计量经济学模型（包括HAR族）在波动率预测上的表现，发现基础模型并未带来一致性的改进。只有Tiny Time Mixers（TTM）在严格基准下微弱胜出，其他基础模型均未超越Log-HAR。大部分优势源于尺度校正而非信息增益，且模型架构的选择比“基础模型vs计量模型”这一宏观选择更为关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证预训练时间序列基础模型（TSFMs）在成熟的波动率预测任务中，是否能够显著超越已被广泛验证的计量经济学基准模型。

Method: 使用VOLARE数据集，在50种资产（股票、外汇、期货）和3个预测视野上，对9种零样本TSFMs与8种计量经济学模型（含HAR族）进行系统比较，采用正式的成对和多模型预测比较检验，并通过Mincer-Zarnowitz再校准分离尺度偏差与信息增益。

Result: 基础模型未实现一致改进；仅TTM在每资产损失比率平均后微弱超越Log-HAR；MZ再校准显示短视野优势主要源于尺度校正，仅月度视野存在真实信息增益；模型架构差异比模型类别差异更显著。

Conclusion: 当前预训练TSFMs在波动率预测上并未提供实质性改进，选择合适架构比选择模型类别更重要；TTM与Log-HAR的简单等权平均组合在几乎所有资产上进入模型置信集，是稳健的实用策略。

Abstract: We ask whether pretrained time series foundation models (TSFMs) improve on established econometric benchmarks for forecasting realized volatility. Using the VOLARE dataset, we conduct the first systematic comparison of nine zero-shot TSFMs against eight econometric specifications, including the Heterogeneous Autoregressive (HAR) family, across 50 assets in equities, foreign exchange, and futures, and three forecast horizons, with formal pairwise and multi-model forecast-comparison tests. Foundation models do not deliver a uniform gain. Pooled losses favor them, but the advantage is concentrated in a few outlier assets; averaging each asset's loss ratio to a well-specified Log-HAR benchmark, so that no single asset dominates, only one small model, Tiny Time Mixers (TTM), beats the benchmark at every horizon, and by a narrow margin. The other foundation models do not improve on Log-HAR, and the econometric benchmarks remain competitive throughout. A Mincer--Zarnowitz recalibration, which removes level and scale bias from every forecast, shows that much of the short-horizon advantage reflects better-scaled forecasts rather than better prediction of volatility dynamics, and only at the monthly horizon does a genuine informational gain remain. Because this edge is thin and even TTM is not best on every asset, a simple equal-weight average of TTM and Log-HAR matches the best single model and enters the Model Confidence Set for 98 to 100\% of assets, more often than either component alone, so a forecaster need not identify the best model for each asset in advance. Our most durable finding is that performance varies so much across foundation-model architectures that choosing the right architecture matters more than the broader choice between foundation and econometric models.

</details>


<div id='eess.IV'></div>

# eess.IV [[Back]](#toc)

### [445] [Pretreatment MRI reveals a latent, molecular-subtype-independent structural phenotype that organizes treatment trajectories and recurrence risk](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02768)
*Dattatreya Kantha,Murray H. Loew*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本研究发现，DCE-MRI中提取的乳腺肿瘤基线结构熵能够揭示传统终点指标（如病理完全缓解）无法捕捉的肿瘤结构响应表型，且在完整应答者中，结构紊乱的肿瘤虽早期缩小更明显但结构紊乱持续存在，形成“体积欺骗”现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的病理完全缓解和肿瘤体积缩小指标无法评估肿瘤应答是否在结构上有利、是否持久、或是否隐藏在体积损失之下，因此需要寻找新的影像学标志物来捕捉这些被忽视的结构响应信息。

Method: 构建基于I-SPY2轨迹的结果盲纵向DCE-MRI流形，通过添加基线结构熵增强表征能力，并使用约束表征映射验证结构的内在性，最后在UCSF、I-SPY1和杜克大学三个外部数据集中验证复发相关性。

Result: 结构响应的主轴无法从临床和基因组数据中恢复，但加入基线结构熵后变得可恢复。治疗过程中体积信号逐渐减弱而熵保持分离，出现“从负荷到结构持久性”的交叉。完整应答者中结构紊乱的肿瘤早期缩小更明显但结构仍紊乱，形成终点标签无法识别的体积欺骗。

Conclusion: 治疗前MRI能够暴露终点指标语言无法识别的结构响应表型，包括完整应答者中结构不同的响应状态，这有待前瞻性验证。

Abstract: Pathologic complete response and tumor shrinkage measure whether breast cancer responds to neoadjuvant therapy, but not whether that response was structurally favorable, persistent, or hidden beneath volume loss. We built an outcome-blind longitudinal DCE-MRI manifold from I-SPY2 trajectories to test whether pretreatment imaging carries a structural response phenotype missed by conventional descriptors. The dominant axis of response geometry was not recoverable from the full clinical and genomic stack -- age, receptor subtype, MammaPrint, PAM50, treatment arm, and tumor burden -- but became strongly recoverable once baseline structural entropy was added. A constrained representation mapping recovered the same axes as unconstrained decomposition, establishing the structure as intrinsic rather than a post-hoc interpretation. The phenotype persisted through therapy, and as treatment proceeded the volumetric signal faded while entropy stayed separated -- a crossover from burden to structural persistence. Among complete responders, structurally disordered tumors could shrink more early yet remain structurally disordered, a volumetric deception invisible to endpoint labels. External analyses in UCSF, I-SPY1, and Duke established recurrence relevance under representation-dependent boundaries, and a representation-family commensurability assessment showed why feature-name matching is insufficient: the same label can fail, transport, or entangle with extraction geometry. Pretreatment MRI therefore exposes a structural response phenotype that endpoint-based language leaves invisible -- including, among complete responders, a pretreatment imaging signal of structurally distinct response states that awaits prospective validation.

</details>


### [446] [AirTF: Over-the-Air Token Fusion for Task-Oriented Multi-Modal Token Communications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03099)
*Bole Liu,Li Qiao,Minghui Wu,Yulin Shao,Zhen Gao*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出了一种面向车联网任务的多模态令牌空中融合框架AirTF，利用ViT编码器和无线信道的叠加特性，实现RGB与红外等模态数据的高效空中融合，显著提升频谱效率，并在多种信道条件下表现出鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 车联网中高维多模态传感数据传输面临严重的频谱瓶颈，现有基于CNN的分割方案局部感受野有限，难以高效融合多模态语义信息。

Method: 基于视觉Transformer（ViT）编码器提取全局语义令牌，利用多址接入信道的叠加特性，将空间对齐的令牌并发传输，实现多模态语义的空中直接融合，同时引入预训练基础模型提供视觉先验缓解小样本问题。

Result: 在AWGN和衰落信道下，AirTF一致优于正交传输和基于CNN的融合基线；三用户场景、残余同步误差和不完美信道估计测试进一步验证了其鲁棒性。

Conclusion: AirTF通过空中令牌融合有效缓解频谱瓶颈，为车联网任务驱动通信提供了新范式，具有较好的实用性和鲁棒性。

Abstract: In the Internet of Vehicles (IoV), transmitting high-dimensional multi-modal sensory data to edge servers for time-sensitive tasks faces severe spectrum bottlenecks. To address this, we propose a foundation model-driven over-the-air token fusion (AirTF) framework for task-oriented multi-modal token communications. Unlike existing schemes for segmentation that rely on convolutional neural networks (CNNs) with limited local receptive fields, AirTF leverages vision transformer (ViT) encoders to extract globally contextualized semantic tokens from distributed heterogeneous sensors. By concurrently transmitting these spatially aligned tokens over a shared wireless channel, our framework exploits the superposition property of the multiple access channel to inherently fuse complementary multi-modal semantics (e.g., RGB and infrared) directly over the air. This mechanism significantly enhances spectral efficiency compared to orthogonal transmission. Furthermore, the integration of a pre-trained foundation model provides critical visual priors, effectively addressing the data-hungry nature of ViTs on limited, scenario-specific semantic segmentation datasets. Experiments demonstrate that AirTF consistently outperforms orthogonal transmission and CNN-based fusion baselines across AWGN and fading channels. Additional evaluations under a three-user setting, residual synchronization errors, and imperfect channel state information estimation further confirm its robustness. The source code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

</details>


### [447] [Mutually Exclusive Multiclass Lesion Segmentation in Neuroimaging: Binary-Guided Weak Supervision with Inter-Class Orthogonality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03203)
*Ashutosh Kumar,Vivek Dhamale,Vaanathi Sundaresan*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出BiMEx-MS框架，通过二元定位引导和多出口分类架构，实现神经影像病灶子类的弱监督分割，在脑肿瘤和颅内出血数据集上超越16种基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 弱监督下共现神经影像病灶子类分割面临重叠激活、噪声伪标签和缺乏类间互斥约束等挑战。

Method: 将多类分割分解为全病灶定位（二元模块提供结构先验）和互斥分类（多出口分类架构+监督对比预训练+类特定注意力网络），通过三重损失（类内分离、类间正交、二元-多类空间一致）和层次化形态学伪标签精炼实现互斥性约束。

Result: 在BraTS 2020/2023 SSA和RSNA-ICH/BHSD上，水肿HD95达29.56mm（唯一低于40mm），硬膜下出血Dice达0.704，边界指标和罕见亚型提升最大；跨数据集泛化、六种架构消融和不确定性量化证实结构引导优于模型容量。

Conclusion: 二元结构先验和互斥性约束是弱监督多类病灶分割性能提升的关键，代码已开源。

Abstract: Weakly supervised segmentation of co-occurring neuroimaging lesion subclasses remains challenging due to overlapping activations, noisy pseudo-labels, and the absence of explicit inter-class exclusivity constraints. We propose BiMEx-MS (Binary-guided Mutually Exclusive Multiclass Segmentation), a framework that decomposes multiclass segmentation into whole-lesion localization and exclusive class assignment: a binary localization module provides a class-frequency-agnostic structural prior confining multiclass predictions within the detected lesion domain, while a multi-exit classification architecture with supervised contrastive pretraining produces multi-scale class-discriminative activation maps aggregated via a class-specific attention network. Inter-class exclusivity is enforced through a tri-partite loss comprising per-class separation, inter-class orthogonality, and binary-multiclass spatial consensus, followed by hierarchical morphological pseudo-label refinement. Evaluated across brain tumor MRI (BraTS 2020, BraTS 2023 SSA) and intracranial hemorrhage CT (RSNA-ICH to BHSD) against sixteen weakly supervised baselines, BiMEx-MS achieves Edema HD95 of 29.56 mm (the only method below 40 mm) and subdural hemorrhage Dice of 0.704, with gains consistently largest on boundary metrics and rare subtypes. Cross-dataset generalization, backbone ablations across six architectures, and uncertainty quantification confirm that structural guidance rather than model capacity drives performance. Code: https://github.com/ashutoshkr45/BiMEx-MS-Neuro.

</details>


### [448] [Piecewise Dynamic Diffusion Regularization for Reconstruction of Cardiac Cine MRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03299)
*Florian Fürnrohr,Reinhard Heckel*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出PDDR方法，利用时空扩散模型作为生成先验，通过分段动态正则化实现自由呼吸下的实时心脏 cine MRI 高质量重建，在计算效率和重建质量上均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实时心脏 cine MRI 在自由呼吸下面临严重的欠采样和运动伪影挑战，现有方法难以在引入强大心脏解剖先验的同时保持计算效率，亟需一种兼具高质量与高效性的重建方案。

Method: 提出分段动态扩散正则化（PDDR），将时空扩散模型作为生成先验集成到变分重建框架中；模型包含空间层（编码解剖结构）和时间层（捕捉心脏运动），并以分段方式利用动态先验高效处理长序列实时数据。

Result: 在回顾性加速和前瞻性实时 cine MRI 实验中，PDDR 在重建质量和计算时间上均优于经典方法、无监督方法和基于扩散的基线方法。

Conclusion: PDDR 是一种实用且可扩展的自由呼吸实时心脏 MRI 解决方案，代码已开源。

Abstract: Real-time cardiac cine MRI enables visualization of the beating heart during free breathing, but severe undersampling and motion make reconstruction highly challenging. A central challenge for reconstruction is incorporating powerful priors of cardiac anatomy while remaining computationally efficient. We propose Piecewise Dynamic Diffusion Regularization (PDDR), a reconstruction method that integrates a spatiotemporal diffusion model as a generative prior within a variational reconstruction framework for cine MRI. The model employs dedicated spatial layers to encode anatomical structure and temporal layers to capture cardiac motion learned from gated cine data. PDDR leverages the dynamic prior in a piecewise manner, enabling the efficient use of spatiotemporal diffusion models for processing of long real-time sequences. Experiments on retrospectively accelerated and prospective real-time cine MRI demonstrate that PDDR outperforms classical, unsupervised, and diffusion-based methods, delivering high-quality reconstructions with substantially reduced computation time compared to state-of-the-art baselines. These results highlight PDDR as a practical and scalable solution for free-breathing, real-time cardiac MRI. Code is available at https://github.com/MLI-lab/pddr.

</details>


### [449] [Motion Estimation Techniques for Volumetric Video Attribute Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03576)
*Haoran Hong,Eduardo Pavez,Antonio Ortega,Ryosuke Watanabe,Keisuke Nonaka*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于几何的动态点云属性压缩方案，通过图运动估计和插值-free分数像素运动估计，在MPEG数据集上相比G-PCC、GeS-TM和V-PCC实现了显著码率节省。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有G-PCC框架中基于运动的几何压缩已有显著进展，但属性压缩的运动技术尚不成熟，难以有效去除属性时域冗余。

Method: 1) 基于几何的帧间编码方案；2) 基于图的运动估计方案；3) 无需插值的分数像素运动估计方法。

Result: 在有损几何条件下，相比G-PCC、GeS-TM和V-PCC分别节省55.3%、42.3%和16.5%的平均码率。

Conclusion: 所提方案在无损和有损几何条件下均优于现有主流方法，有效降低了动态点云属性压缩的时域冗余。

Abstract: Point cloud compression relies on techniques to compress both geometry and attributes. Motion-based approaches for dynamic solid point cloud geometry compression within the geometry-based point cloud compression (G-PCC) framework have achieved significant reductions in geometry rate. However, motion-based techniques for attribute compression remain underexplored, making it challenging to achieve significant reductions in the temporal redundancy of attributes. Firstly, this paper proposes a geometry-based inter-coding scheme to compress the attributes of dynamic solid point clouds. Secondly, a graph-based motion-estimation scheme for point-cloud attribute compression is proposed. Thirdly, an interpolation-free fractional-voxel motion estimation method is proposed to refine motion accuracy to fractional-voxel precision. Our experimental results on the MPEG point cloud dataset show that the proposed scheme outperforms G-PCC, GeS-TM, and V-PCC in lossless and lossy geometry conditions. We achieve average bitrate savings of $55.3\%$, $42.3\%$, and $16.5\%$ over G-PCC, GeS-TM, and V-PCC, respectively, under lossy-geometry conditions.

</details>


### [450] [An Interpretable Deep Learning Framework for Discovery and Clinical Validation of Deep Radiomic Signatures in Tumor Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03593)
*Chengkun Sun,Jinqian Pan,Renjie Liang,Zhengkang Fan,Xin Miao,Yi Guo,Mei Liu,Muxuan Liang,Russell Terry,Jie Xu*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出一个融合深度学习分割、可解释分类和影像组学分析的统一框架，用于发现可解释的影像学标志物，在多个数据集上验证了其优于传统全肿瘤影像组学的性能，并提供了更好的生物学可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习在影像标志物发现中潜力巨大，但可解释性差限制了临床采用；现有方法预测性能高但缺乏生物学洞察。

Method: 首先用分割模型精确勾画肿瘤，然后通过Grad-CAM引导的流程识别诊断重要区域作为候选影像标志物，采用基于互信息的自适应阈值策略进行患者特异性标志物提取，最后用深度学习模型验证标志物，并用SHAP解释影像组学特征。

Result: 在BUSI乳腺超声、KiTS肾脏CT、BraTS脑肿瘤及UF Health肾脏CT数据集上，相比全肿瘤影像组学，该方法在判别性能上更优，且生物学可解释性更强。

Conclusion: 该框架将深度学习注意力转化为可重复的定量影像生物标志物，为非侵入性肿瘤表征和影像标志物发现提供了可解释且可重复的解决方案。

Abstract: Imaging signatures are quantitative features extracted from medical images that provide clinically meaningful information for tumor diagnosis, characterization, prognosis, and treatment planning. Although deep learning has shown great potential for imaging signature discovery, its limited interpretability remains a major barrier to clinical adoption. Existing approaches often achieve high predictive performance but provide little biological insight into the identified signatures. We propose a unified framework for interpretable imaging signature discovery by integrating deep learning based segmentation, explainable classification, and radiomic analysis. A robust segmentation model is first used to accurately delineate tumors, followed by a Grad-CAM guided pipeline that identifies diagnostically important regions as candidate imaging signatures. A mutual information based adaptive thresholding strategy enables patient-specific signature extraction. The resulting signatures are validated using a downstream deep learning classification model, while radiomic features extracted from the signature regions are evaluated with traditional machine learning models and interpreted using SHAP to identify the most discriminative biomarkers. The proposed framework is evaluated on the public BUSI breast ultrasound, KiTS renal CT, and BraTS brain tumor datasets, as well as a private UF Health renal CT cohort. Compared with conventional whole-tumor radiomics, the proposed signature-based approach achieves improved discriminative performance while providing greater biological interpretability. By converting deep learning attention into reproducible quantitative imaging biomarkers, this framework offers an interpretable and reproducible solution for non-invasive tumor characterization and imaging biomarker discovery.

</details>


### [451] [Model Confidence-Guided Multi-Image Fusion of Fundus Images for Diabetic Retinopathy Diagnosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03643)
*Ananya Raghu,Anisha Raghu,Alice S. Tang,Yannis M. Paulus,Tyson N. Kim,Tomiko T. Oskotsky*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于置信度的多图像融合框架，用于糖尿病视网膜病变筛查。该方法通过整合多个视网膜视图并利用置信度识别不可靠预测，在覆盖率为70%时分别达到91%和97%的平衡准确率，显著优于传统图像质量级联过滤方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在中低收入国家，由于医疗资源有限，早期眼病筛查至关重要。现有方法依赖图像质量过滤，但人工标注的质量标签与诊断性能关联较弱，导致筛查可靠性不足。

Method: 开发了一种多图像融合方法，聚合多个视网膜视图以提升置信度和平衡准确率；利用置信度识别不可靠预测并在需要时提示重拍；对比了三种方法：单图像级联质量-疾病诊断流水线、基于置信度的预测、以及置信度引导的多图像融合流水线，使用RETFoundGreen骨干网络在mBRSET和BRSET数据集上评估。

Result: 在70%覆盖率下，mBRSET上平衡准确率达91%，BRSET上达97%，分别比级联过滤提升约12%和6%；在50%覆盖率下，敏感性分别达到94%和96%，远超级联方法的61%和86%。

Conclusion: 人工标注的质量标签与诊断性能弱相关，基于置信度的过滤方法始终优于基于图像质量的级联流水线；该框架的轻量级骨干网络和单次推理与资源有限的移动筛查系统兼容，可减少错误诊断。

Abstract: Purpose: Early screening for eye diseases is critical in low- and middle-income countries where access to care is limited. We investigate whether a confidence-guided, multi-image diabetic retinopathy diagnosis framework can integrate image filtering with confidence-aware predictions for reliable screening at capture.
  Methods: We develop a multi-image fusion method that aggregates retinal views to improve confidence and balanced accuracy. Our method uses confidence to identify unreliable predictions, prompting retakes when needed.
  We compare: (1) a cascaded image-quality and disease diagnosis pipeline using a single image per patient, (2) confidence-based prediction, and (3) our confidence-based multi-image fusion pipeline. All methods are evaluated using a RETFoundGreen backbone on the mBRSET (n = 1,234) and BRSET (n = 7,599) datasets.
  Results: At 70% coverage, our method achieves 91% balanced accuracy on mBRSET and 97% on BRSET, improvements of ~12% and ~6%, respectively, over cascade filtering. The image-quality cascade reaches sensitivities of 61% on mBRSET and 86% on BRSET, whereas our framework reaches 94% and 96%, respectively, at 50% coverage.
  Conclusions: Human-annotated quality labels are weakly associated with diagnostic performance, and confidence-based filtering consistently outperforms image quality-based cascaded pipelines.
  Translational Relevance: Using confidence-based multi-image fusion, patients receive more reliable predictions, reducing incorrect diagnoses during screening. The lightweight backbone and single inference pass per image make the framework compatible with low-latency mobile screening systems in resource-limited settings.

</details>


### [452] [Deep Learning-Based Characterization of Detonation-Cell Size Distributions in Soot-Foil Records](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03764)
*Mingyang Bu,Robson A. Schneider,Karl P. Chatelain,Mhedine Alicherif,Yingchen Shi,Andrés Z. Mendiburu,Deanna A. Lacoste,Bing Wang*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Mask R-CNN深度学习的爆轰细胞自动识别方法，在噪声大、边界模糊的真实实验图像上实现了高精度像素级分割，细胞尺寸预测相对误差低于3.5%，并首次实现了细胞尺寸沿传播方向的时空演化追踪及高阶规则性特征（不规则度指数、偏转角度标准差）的定量提取。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统爆轰细胞测量依赖人工手动操作，耗时且主观；现有计算机视觉方法在真实实验图像（高噪声、模糊边界、严重重叠）上泛化能力差。亟需一种自动化、客观且鲁棒的方法来提取爆轰细胞的几何尺寸和规则性特征。

Method: 基于Mask R-CNN实例分割深度学习模型；构建包含数值模拟和物理实验的异构数据集；采用迁移学习策略；通过灵敏度消融实验建立标准化的图像分块预处理范式。

Result: 基准验证中像素级一致性高；规则与不规则条件下平均细胞尺寸预测相对误差分别低于2%和3.5%；模型具备尺度适应性；实现了细胞尺寸沿传播方向的时空演化自动追踪；定量提取了不规则度指数(RI)和细胞偏转角度标准差等高阶特征，与理论预期一致。

Conclusion: 该方法显著提升了爆轰细胞统计分析的效率和客观性，克服了仅提取全局平均尺寸的局限，为实验和数值烟膜提供了一种强大的数据提取工具。

Abstract: The geometric size and regularity of detonation cells are key physical parameters for characterizing detonation waves. Traditional manual measurement of soot foils is time-consuming and subjective, while existing computer vision techniques often exhibit poor generalization on real experimental images with high noise, blurred boundaries, and severe overlapping. To address this, we propose a novel method for automated recognition and high-order feature extraction of detonation cells based on deep learning instance segmentation (Mask R-CNN). By constructing a custom heterogeneous dataset (numerical simulations and physical experiments) and integrating transfer learning, the model achieves accurate pixel-level mask prediction within highly noisy flow fields. Results indicate high pixel-level agreement in benchmark validations and strong robustness against noise in complex real-world soot foils. Predicted average cell sizes agree well with manual measurements, yielding relative errors under 2% and 3.5% for regular and irregular conditions, respectively. Sensitivity ablation experiments confirm the model's scale adaptability and guided the establishment of a standardized preprocessing paradigm for appropriate image patching. Overcoming the limitation of extracting only global average sizes, this model achieves automated tracking of the transient spatial evolution of cell sizes along the propagation direction. Furthermore, it quantitatively extracts high-order regularity features, such as the irregularity index (RI) and standard deviation of cell deflection angles, demonstrating consistency with theoretical expectations. The proposed method enhances the efficiency and objectivity of statistical analysis, providing a powerful data extraction tool for experimental and numerical soot foils.

</details>


### [453] [CompressedVQA-AEV: Full-Reference and No-Reference Quality Assessment Models for Asymmetric Encoded Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04606)
*Wei Sun,Xingwei Liu,Dandan Zhu,Xiangyang Zhu,Weixia Zhang,Guangtao Zhai*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文针对QoMEX 2026不对称编码视频质量评估挑战赛，提出了全参考模型CompressedVQA-AEV-FR和无参考模型CompressedVQA-AEV-NR，分别获得FR赛道第一名和NR赛道第四名。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 应对QoMEX 2026关于不对称编码视频的质量评估挑战，分别在有参考和无参考场景下设计有效的视频质量评估模型。

Method: FR方法采用Swin-B骨干网络提取参考视频与失真视频之间的多阶段相似性统计特征进行质量预测；NR方法使用基于SigLIP2和Swin-B的互补帧级编码器，结合时序平均池化和交叉折叠集成策略来估计感知质量。

Result: CompressedVQA-AEV-FR在FR赛道获得第一名，CompressedVQA-AEV-NR在NR赛道获得第四名。

Conclusion: 提出的模型在不对称编码视频质量评估任务上表现有效，代码已开源。

Abstract: This report presents our solutions to the QoMEX 2026 Grand Challenge on Video Quality Assessment for Asymmetric Encoded Videos, comprising a full-reference (FR) model, CompressedVQA-AEV-FR, and a no-reference (NR) model, CompressedVQA-AEV-NR. The FR approach leverages a Swin-B backbone to extract multi-stage similarity statistics between reference and distorted videos for quality prediction. For the NR setting, our model employs complementary frame-level encoders based on SigLIP2 and Swin-B, followed by temporal mean pooling and cross-fold ensembling to estimate perceptual quality without reference data. Our CompressedVQA-AEV-FR achieves first place in the FR track of QoMEX 2026 Grand Challenge, while CompressedVQA-AEV-NR secures fourth place in the NR track, demonstrating the effectiveness of our proposed models. The code is available at https://github.com/sunwei925/CompressedVQA-AEV.

</details>


### [454] [GALOSH: Blind, Training-Free Denoising of Raw Bayer and sRGB Images by Parallel-Friendly Local Shrinkage](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03768)
*Yoshiro Sato*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: GALOSH是一种无需训练、无需搜索的图像去噪方法，通过局部Walsh-Hadamard变换和回归操作，在速度、质量和跨域泛化上均优于BM3D等传统方法，接近深度学习模型，且支持CPU和定点硬件部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统无训练去噪方法（如BM3D）依赖块匹配搜索，导致内存访问不规则、并行性差、延迟不可控；而有监督学习方法虽质量高但需训练数据、泛化能力受限且计算开销大（依赖GPU）。本文旨在设计一种无需搜索、无需训练、跨域通用且高效的去噪方法。

Method: 提出GALOSH方法，流程包括：盲估计每张图像的泊松-高斯噪声参数 → 广义Anscombe变换稳定噪声 → 亮度通道的两轮局部Walsh-Hadamard收缩 → 色度通道的亮度引导局部回归。所有操作局部、数据无关、计算图固定，支持RAW和sRGB/YUV两种域。

Result: 在SIDD Medium、RawNIND等四个真实噪声基准上，GALOSH在无训练盲去噪方法中表现最佳，超越BM3D和NLM系列基线；在RAW数据上接近有监督网络；速度比深度学习基线快7-650倍，且是唯一在CPU上也能高效运行的强基线方法。

Conclusion: GALOSH证明了无需搜索、无训练的局部去噪方法可以在质量上超越传统BM3D类方法，并接近深度学习模型，同时具备极快的速度和硬件友好的数据结构，适合部署在CPU、FPGA或定点硬件上。

Abstract: Classical training-free denoisers such as BM3D and non-local means owe much of their strength to search: content-dependent block matching whose memory traffic and data-dependent control flow parallelize poorly and preclude fixed-latency implementations. Learned denoisers reach the highest quality, but they need training data, degrade outside their training domain (which we also observe), and carry per-pixel compute budgets that effectively require a GPU. We present GALOSH (Generalized Anscombe LOcal SHrinkage), a redesign of training-free denoising that removes the search entirely and aims at multi-domain coverage, speed, and quality at once: a blind per-image Poisson-Gaussian noise fit, a generalized Anscombe transform, a two-pass local Walsh-Hadamard shrinkage of luminance, and a luminance-guided local regression of chrominance -- two deliberately different operators for the two perceptually different noise components, each with its own strength control. Every stage is local, data-independent, and regular -- the same computation graph for every pixel of every image. One core serves two domains: raw Bayer mosaics and sRGB/YUV images. On four real-noise benchmarks (SIDD Medium and RawNIND, raw and sRGB) GALOSH is consistently the strongest among the tested blind, training-free methods -- surpassing BM3D- and NLM-family baselines even when those are given an oracle noise level -- and approaches trained networks on raw data while remaining below in-domain trained networks at high ISO in sRGB. Being search-free makes it fast: 7x-650x faster than the DL baselines on the same GPU at full benchmark size, and the only strong method in the comparison that also runs practically on plain CPUs. The fixed, data-independent structure is designed to map naturally onto fixed-point and streaming hardware, supported by an operation-count analysis and a working INT16 fixed-point realization.

</details>


### [455] [Discovering shared interpretable operations in image compression autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04839)
*Caroline Mazini Rodrigues,Nicolas Keriven,Thomas Maugey*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文通过雅可比分析研究无偏置自编码器的内部行为，旨在从高复杂度深度学习模型中提取通用规律，从而设计低复杂度的图像压缩模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前深度学习图像压缩模型日益复杂且不透明，缺乏对内部行为的理解，导致模型不断增大以追求性能提升。作者希望探索是否存在可检测的通用行为，以便简化模型设计。

Method: 对无偏置自编码器进行雅可比分析（Jacobian analysis），检测其内部操作是否存在通用行为模式。

Result: 如果存在通用行为，可将其提取出来，用于设计受高复杂度深度学习架构启发的低复杂度图像压缩模型。

Conclusion: 通过理解自编码器的内部机制，有望在不牺牲率-失真性能的前提下，显著降低模型复杂度。

Abstract: With the increasing adoption of deep learning for applications such as image compression, improvements in the rate-distortion trade-off have been achieved at the cost of increasingly larger and more opaque ''black-box'' models. Autoencoders are among the most widely used architectures for this task; however, without a clear understanding of their internal behavior, these models tend to grow in complexity to achieve more performance gains. In this paper, we investigate whether universal behaviors can be detected from the internal operations of bias-free autoencoders through Jacobian analysis. If such behaviors exist, they may be extracted to design low-complexity image compression models inspired by high-complexity deep learning architectures.

</details>


### [456] [GLOW-FDG: Generalized cancer LesiOn Whole-body segmentation model for $^{18}$F-FDG-PET/CT](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03931)
*Maksym Fritsak,Maximilian Rokuss,Hubert S. Gabryś,Yannick Kirchhoff,Benjamin Hamm,Sebastian M. Christ,Nicolas Martz,Isabelle Opitz,Rolf Stahel,Martin Hüllner,Matthias Guckenberger,Klaus Maier-Hein,Stephanie Tanadini-Lang*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: GLOW-FDG是一个开源AI模型，用于全身PET/CT中多种癌症的病灶分割，在185个外部扫描中表现优于现有模型，且接近专家水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手动病灶勾画速度慢、主观性强、难以规模化，亟需自动化、可泛化的分割工具。

Method: 基于1,563例多癌种PET/CT扫描训练的开源AI模型，并在185例来自独立机构的外部扫描上进行评估。

Result: 在乳腺癌、肺癌、头颈癌和黑色素瘤中，病灶检测优于公开基准模型，假阳性减少，分割精度高；肿瘤负荷量化稳健，性能接近放射肿瘤科专家间变异度。

Conclusion: GLOW-FDG可作为自动化癌症分割和定量影像生物标志物提取的通用工具。

Abstract: Whole-body fluorodeoxyglucose positron emission tomography combined with computed tomography is widely used in cancer care, but manual lesion delineation is slow, subjective, and difficult to scale. We present GLOW-FDG, an open-source artificial intelligence model for whole-body cancer lesion segmentation in fluorodeoxyglucose positron emission tomography and computed tomography. The model was trained on 1,563 scans spanning multiple cancer types and evaluated on 185 external scans from independent institutions. Across breast cancer, nonmetastatic and oligometastatic lung cancer, head and neck cancer, and metastatic melanoma, GLOW-FDG consistently outperformed publicly available benchmark models in lesion detection, while reducing false positives and maintaining strong segmentation accuracy. Quantification of total tumor burden and total lesion glycolysis was robust across cohorts, and performance approached the variability observed between expert radiation oncologists. These results support GLOW-FDG as a generalizable tool for automated cancer segmentation and quantitative imaging biomarker extraction in whole-body imaging.

</details>


### [457] [Cross-Modal Fusion of OCT and OCT angiography enface for Improved Diagnostics of Diabetic Retinopathy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03959)
*Rashadul Hasan Badhon,Atalie Carina Thompson,Jennifer I. Lim,Theodore Leng,Minhaj Nur Alam*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于双向交叉模态注意力网络的OCT与OCTA跨模态融合方法，用于糖尿病视网膜病变自动分类。实验表明，融合方法优于单模态OCT基线，且由OCT生成的伪OCTA在多数场景下能达到甚至超越真实OCTA的性能，为资源受限环境下的低成本筛查提供了可行方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 糖尿病视网膜病变是全球致盲主因之一，需要准确且可及的筛查工具。OCT提供视网膜结构信息，OCTA提供血管信息，二者互补，但OCTA硬件成本高、普及率低，因此探索无需专用硬件的跨模态融合方法具有重要临床价值。

Method: 提出双向交叉模态注意力网络，融合OCT B-scan与单通道en face OCTA进行DR分类。在OCT500和UIC两个数据集（共730名受试者）上，设计了数据集内、组合数据集和跨数据集泛化三种评估设置。以ConvNeXt V2为单模态基线，对比了真实OCTA和由OCT生成的翻译OCTA两种融合方案。

Result: 跨模态融合在所有评估场景中均优于单模态OCT分类。真实OCTA融合提升了分类准确率和判别性能；翻译OCTA在多数设置中达到可比或更优结果，并在跨数据集泛化中提高了灵敏度和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 基于注意力的OCT-OCTA en face融合能显著提升DR检测性能，计算生成的伪OCTA可作为硬件获取OCTA的低成本替代方案，有助于在资源有限的环境中大规模部署高性能视网膜筛查系统。

Abstract: Diabetic retinopathy (DR) is a leading cause of vision impairment worldwide, highlighting the need for accurate and accessible screening tools. Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) provides high-resolution structural information of the retina, whereas OCT angiography (OCTA) offers complementary vascular information that is highly relevant for DR diagnosis. In this study, we propose a cross-modal fusion of OCT B-scans with single-channel en face OCTA using a bidirectional cross-modal attention network for automated DR classification. Two independent datasets, OCT500 and UIC, comprising 730 subjects in total, were utilized to evaluate performance under within-dataset, combined-dataset, and cross-dataset generalization settings. A ConvNeXt V2 model trained solely on OCT images served as the unimodal baseline. In addition to ground-truth (GT) OCTA, we explored the use of translated (TR) OCTA generated from OCT scans, eliminating the requirement for dedicated OCTA hardware. Experimental results demonstrate that cross-modal fusion consistently outperforms unimodal OCT classification across all evaluation scenarios. Fusion with GT OCTA improved classification accuracy and discriminative performance, while TR OCTA achieved comparable or superior results in most settings. Furthermore, TR OCTA improved sensitivity and cross-dataset generalization, indicating enhanced robustness to domain shifts. These findings demonstrate that attention-based OCT-OCTA en face fusion provides clinically meaningful improvements for DR detection and suggest that computationally generated OCTA can serve as a practical, low-cost alternative to hardware-acquired OCTA, enabling broader deployment of high-performance retinal screening systems in resource-limited clinical environments.

</details>


### [458] [FedProIn: Mitigating Client Drift for Learnable Prototypes in Federated Medical Imaging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04158)
*Harsh Kumar,Tarun Kumar Garg,Vaanathi Sundaresan*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于原型和影响力感知的联邦学习框架FedProIn，通过多类可学习原型、特征发散损失、原型对比损失及归一化影响力聚合策略，有效缓解非独立同分布数据导致的客户端漂移问题，在医学图像数据集上取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习受统计异质性（非IID数据）严重制约，导致客户端漂移、收敛不稳定及全局模型次优，现有参数聚合方法无法有效解决这一问题。

Method: 1) 采用多个可学习类原型捕获跨客户端的共享语义结构；2) 提出特征发散损失和原型对比损失将客户端漂移分解为特征漂移和原型漂移进行缓解；3) 设计归一化影响力聚合策略，根据客户端原型对全局表示的贡献自适应加权。

Result: 在HAM10000数据集上达到83.5%（IID）和81.1%（非IID）准确率；在Matek-19数据集上达到96.2%（IID）和95.8%（非IID）准确率，均优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: FedProIn通过原型学习和影响力感知聚合有效缓解了非IID数据下的客户端漂移问题，在医学图像联邦学习场景中显著提升了模型性能和稳定性。

Abstract: Federated learning (FL) is severely hindered by statistical heterogeneity due to variations in scanners, acquisition protocols, and patient populations. Such non-IID data induces client drift during local optimization, leading to unstable convergence and suboptimal global models when parameter-based aggregation is applied. We propose a prototype-based, influence-aware federated learning framework (FedProIn) that uses multiple learnable class prototypes to capture shared semantic structures across heterogeneous clients. We introduce feature divergence loss and prototype contrastive loss to mitigate client drift by decomposing it into feature drift and prototype drift. In addition, we propose a normalized influence aggregation strategy that adaptively weights client prototypes according to their contribution to the global representation, reducing the impact of biased or low-quality updates. Experimental results on two publicly available medical datasets, HAM10000 and Matek-19, demonstrate that FedProIn achieves accuracies of (83.5% IID, 81.1% non-IID) on HAM10000 and (96.2% IID, 95.8% non-IID) on Matek-19, respectively, outperforming existing baselines in both conditions. Our code is available at https://github.com/harsh-kmr/FedProIn.

</details>


### [459] [Non-Line-of-Sight imaging using raster scanning at NIR wavelength](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04183)
*Mohammad Roueinfar,Mahdi Salmanian*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于近红外激光和云台栅格扫描的非视距成像方法，通过三次反射（中继墙→隐藏目标→中继墙→相机）实现了对遮挡物体的高质量成像，并使用MSE和RMSE评估了重建图像与真实图像的误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非视距成像技术能够可视化被遮挡的物体，具有变革性潜力，但目前相关方法在近红外波段下的系统性评估仍有待探索。

Method: 使用808 nm波长、500 mW功率的近红外激光，结合云台（pan-tilt）装置进行栅格扫描。激光经三次反射（中继墙—隐藏目标—中继墙）后由近红外相机接收，重建隐藏目标图像。

Result: 在三种不同目标上均能恢复高质量图像，通过与真实图像对比，采用MSE和RMSE指标进行评估，验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提出的近红外栅格扫描非视距成像方法能够有效恢复被遮挡物体的高质量图像，为NLOS成像在近红外波段的应用提供了系统性的实验验证。

Abstract: Non-line-of-sight (NLOS) imaging is an emerging technique with transformative potential, enabling the visualization of hidden objects through indirect light reflection. This paper presents a NLOS imaging method operating in the near-infrared (NIR) wavelengths, specifically employing a raster scanning technique with a pan-tilt device. The NIR laser, operating at a wavelength of 808 nm and an output power of 500 mW, illuminates a hidden target occluded by an obstacle. The imaging process involves three bounces: the laser beam first strikes a relay wall, then reflects off the hidden target, returns to the relay wall, and subsequently reaches the NIR camera. This study systematically evaluates the effectiveness of the proposed method across three distinct targets, demonstrating the capability to recover high-quality images from non-line-of-sight scenarios. The obtained images of the hidden targets are compared with their ground truth images, and the error in the obtained images is assessed based on the criteria of Mean Squared Error (MSE) and Root Mean Square Error (RMSE).

</details>


### [460] [MambaRefine-CD: MambaVision with Region-Boundary Temporal Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04403)
*Dineth Perera,Thaariq Firdous,Oshadha Samarakoon,Roshan Godaliyadda,Parakrama Ekanayake,Vijitha Herath*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: MambaRefine-CD 是一种基于共享 MambaVision 编码器的区域-边界时间细化框架，通过 D-RBI 模块分离区域与边界流，结合自适应感受野 FPN 和有界残差细化，在 DSIFN-CD 和 WHU-CD 数据集上取得了优异的变更检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 遥感图像中的二值变化检测需要同时实现完整的变化区域定位和精确的边界描绘，现有方法在这两方面往往难以兼顾。

Method: 提出 MambaRefine-CD 框架，包含 D-RBI 模块（利用配对特征、绝对差和符号差构建时序证据，分离为区域流和 Sobel 条件边界流）、CRAM-lite 增强区域特征、自适应感受野 FPN 解码，以及利用最细边界流对粗预测进行有界残差细化。

Result: 在 DSIFN-CD 和 WHU-CD 数据集上，在验证过的评估设置下取得了较高的变化类 F1 和 IoU 指标。

Conclusion: 消融实验支持了符号时序证据以及完整的区域-边界细化流程的有效性。

Abstract: Binary change detection in remote sensing requires both complete changed-region localization and accurate boundary delineation. We present MambaRefine-CD, a region-boundary temporal refinement framework built on a shared MambaVision encoder. The proposed D-RBI module constructs temporal evidence from paired features, absolute differences, and signed differences, then separates it into region and Sobel-conditioned boundary streams. Region features are enhanced with CRAM-lite and decoded by an adaptive receptive-field FPN, while the finest boundary stream guides a bounded residual refinement of the coarse prediction. Experiments on DSIFN-CD and WHU-CD show strong changed-class F1 and IoU under verified evaluation settings, and ablations support the contribution of signed temporal evidence and the full region-boundary refinement pipeline.

</details>


### [461] [Reduced-complexity Adaptive Loop Filtering via Input-dependent Graph Filters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04985)
*Wen-Yang Lu,Eduardo Pavez,Antonio Ortega,Roman Chernyak,Shan Liu*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于图的固定滤波框架用于自适应环路滤波，通过图结构编码像素强度关系，在保持与ECM基线相当性能的同时，将所需滤波器数量减少一个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ECM中基于梯度的分类器训练大量固定滤波器存在冗余和高实现复杂度，如何在抑制压缩伪影的同时减少冗余是关键挑战。

Method: 提出基于图的固定滤波框架，利用图编码像素强度关系来捕获局部结构信息，将固定滤波器学习为多项式图滤波器，使结构相似的局部模式共享滤波行为。

Result: 在保持与ECM基线相当性能的前提下，所需滤波器数量减少一个数量级。

Conclusion: 基于图的滤波方法能有效替代传统梯度分类方法，大幅降低滤波器数量冗余和实现复杂度，同时保持压缩伪影抑制能力。

Abstract: Adaptive Loop Filtering is an important tool for suppressing compression artifacts in modern video codecs. In the enhanced compression model (ECM), a software test model used for experimenting with video coding tools beyond Versatile Video Coding, fixed filters are trained offline and achieve high signal adaptivity via a fine-grained gradient-based classifier, resulting in a large number of fixed filters that introduce redundancy and increased implementation complexity. Reducing this redundancy without compromising artifact suppression, therefore, remains a key challenge. This paper proposes an alternative graph-based fixed-filtering framework for adaptive loop filtering. By using a graph to encode pixel-intensity relationships, our approach captures local structural information more effectively than gradient-based classification alone. Fixed filters are learned as polynomial graph filters, enabling structurally similar local patterns to share common filtering behavior. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves a comparable performance to the ECM baseline while reducing the number of required filters by an order of magnitude.

</details>


### [462] [MedMambaLite: Hardware-Aware Mamba for Medical Image Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.05049)
*Romina Aalishah,Mozhgan Navardi,Tinoosh Mohsenin*

Main category: eess.IV

TL;DR: 本文提出MedMambaLite，一种基于知识蒸馏的硬件感知Mamba模型，用于医学图像分类。在10个MedMNIST数据集上达到94.5%准确率，参数减少22.8倍，能效比MedMamba提升63%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘设备部署深度学习模型面临模型大小和计算能力的限制，亟需在保持高性能的同时实现轻量化、低能耗的医学图像分类方案。

Method: 基于MedMamba模型，通过修改和减少架构冗余实现轻量化；采用知识蒸馏，降低嵌入维度将知识迁移至更小的学生模型；在NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano上部署。

Result: 在10个MedMNIST数据集上达到94.5%总体准确率；参数减少22.8倍；在Jetson Orin Nano上实现35.6 GOPS/J能效，比MedMamba提升63%。

Conclusion: MedMambaLite成功在保持高准确率的同时大幅降低模型参数和能耗，证明了硬件感知设计与知识蒸馏结合在边缘端医学图像分类中的有效性。

Abstract: AI-powered medical devices have driven the need for real-time, on-device inference such as biomedical image classification. Deployment of deep learning models at the edge is now used for applications such as anomaly detection and classification in medical images. However, achieving this level of performance on edge devices remains challenging due to limitations in model size and computational capacity. To address this, we present MedMambaLite, a hardware-aware Mamba-based model optimized through knowledge distillation for medical image classification. We start with a powerful MedMamba model, integrating a Mamba structure for efficient feature extraction in medical imaging. We make the model lighter and faster in training and inference by modifying and reducing the redundancies in the architecture. We then distill its knowledge into a smaller student model by reducing the embedding dimensions. The optimized model achieves 94.5% overall accuracy on 10 MedMNIST datasets. It also reduces parameters 22.8x compared to MedMamba. Deployment on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano achieves 35.6 GOPS/J energy per inference. This outperforms MedMamba by 63% improvement in energy per inference.

</details>


<div id='cs.AI'></div>

# cs.AI [[Back]](#toc)

### [463] [Evaluating Generative Agents with Actions Grounded in Socially Distributed Task Environments using Incognita](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02975)
*Dan C. Hsu,Luke Lu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了社交分布式任务环境的概念，并构建了Incognita框架，用于评估AI代理在需要跨角色沟通获取知识并执行可验证行动的场景中的表现。实验显示，更强模型虽能获取更多隐藏知识、联系更多实体，但整体成功率仍很低（最高17.2%），暴露了代理在知识 elicitation、源选择、行动尝试和过早完成任务信念等方面的行为缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 grounded benchmarks 提供了可执行动作和可验证结果，社交模拟环境提供了丰富的语言交互，但缺乏结合两者的评估设置。本研究旨在定义一个结合社交交互和可验证行动执行的评估环境。

Method: 定义了社交分布式任务环境（Socially Distributed Task Environments），提出Incognita框架，将社交交互与 grounded 执行分离，包括路由代理、专家实体、确定性子环境和离线评估器。在Incognita-Retail中转化tau-bench零售任务，评估三个生成式代理模型在18个任务上的表现。

Result: 成功率从0%提升到8.9%和17.2%，过早完成任务从100%下降到87%和58%。更强模型能获取更多隐藏知识、联系更多实体、尝试更多 grounded 写入，但可靠性仍然很低。

Conclusion: 社交分布式任务环境能够暴露代理在可靠成功之前的行为特征（包括知识 elicitation、源选择、行动尝试和过早完成任务信念），揭示了当前代理模型在社交知识获取与决策执行结合方面的不足。

Abstract: Effective agency in social environments depends on when an agent seeks knowledge, when it acts, and whether its actions are justified by acquired information. Existing grounded benchmarks provide executable actions, persistent state, and verifiable outcomes, while social simulation environments provide rich interaction among language agents. We study an evaluation setting that combines these requirements. We define socially distributed task environments as interactive environments where task-relevant knowledge is partitioned across role-isolated participants and consequential actions are accessible only through them. Communication serves as exploration over role-partitioned knowledge, while grounded action serves as exploitation over environment state. We introduce Incognita, a Concordia-based framework that separates social interaction from grounded execution. The evaluated agent routes messages to a user or specialist entities; specialists mediate admissible operations; a deterministic sub-environment executes accepted operations over a canonical state; and an offline evaluator scores outcomes with inherited rewards. Incognita-Retail transforms tau-bench retail into a multi-entity environment while preserving final-state reward semantics. We evaluate three generative agent models on 18 tasks stratified by social breadth, with 540 trials. Progress appears in reward and behavior: success rises from 0 percent to 8.9 percent and 17.2 percent, while premature finalization falls from 100 percent to 87 percent and 58 percent. Stronger models elicit more hidden knowledge, contact more entities, and attempt more grounded writes, yet reliability remains low. These findings show that socially distributed task environments expose behavior before reliable success, including knowledge elicitation, source selection, grounded action attempts, and premature completion belief.

</details>


### [464] [Silicon Sampling via Cross-Survey Transfer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03091)
*Chan-Tung Ku,Chan Hsu,Pei-Cing Huang,Frank Cheng-shan Liu,I-Ling Cheng,Yihuang Kang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出跨调查迁移（cross-survey transfer）作为更严格的评估框架，检验LLM在硅采样中的个体层面预测能力。基于TEDS 2024数据，零样本LLM在未见项目上达到52%准确率，接近监督随机森林（相差6个百分点），并揭示了构念可预测性层级、方差坍缩与安全对齐效应的细微差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有硅采样评估多依赖分布层面的比较，可能混淆模式匹配与连贯的个体层面预测能力，亟需更严谨的评估框架来检验LLM能否像真实受访者一样做出一致的回答。

Method: 提出跨调查迁移框架：给定受访者对一组问题的回答，要求LLM预测其对同一调查中完全不同问题的回答。使用TEDS 2024数据、三个开源LLM（27B-120B参数）及监督学习基线进行实验。

Result: (1)零样本LLM在未见项目上准确率52%，与监督随机森林相差6个百分点；(2)构念可预测性呈稳定层级：政党态度67%最高，主权问题23%最低；(3)方差坍缩和安全对齐效应比以往报告更复杂，方差坍缩同样影响监督模型，对齐效应因模型家族而异。

Conclusion: 研究结果厘清了硅采样的潜力与边界，表明LLM在个体层面预测任务上具有一定能力但受构念类型和模型特性影响。

Abstract: Silicon sampling-using large language models (LLMs) to simulate human survey respondents-has emerged as a promising approach for augmenting traditional survey research. However, most evaluations rely on distributional comparisons rather than individual-level prediction, which risks conflating pattern matching with coherent respondent-level prediction. We propose cross-survey transfer, a more rigorous evaluation framework in which an LLM is given a respondent's answers to one set of questions and must predict their answers to entirely different questions from the same survey. Using data from the Taiwan Election and Democratization Study (TEDS) 2024, three open-weight LLMs (27B-120B parameters), and supervised machine learning baselines, we find that: (1) zero-shot LLMs achieve 52% accuracy on genuinely unseen items, closing to within 6 percentage points (pp) of a supervised random forest trained on same-population data; (2) a stable construct predictability hierarchy emerges, from 67% for partisan attitudes to 23% for sovereignty; and (3) variance collapse and safety alignment effects-two commonly cited LLM limitations-turn out to be more nuanced than previously reported, with variance collapse affecting supervised models as well and alignment effects varying dramatically across model families. These findings clarify both the promise and boundaries of silicon sampling.

</details>


### [465] [Evaluating LLM Uncertainty in Long-Form Generation Using Deterministic Ground Truth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03870)
*Ido Amit,Ido Galil,Ran El-Yaniv*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出SALT基准，用于细粒度评估LLM长文本生成的不确定性估计，揭示置信度排名在原子级别失效、推理引入准确性与排名质量权衡等关键发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长文本生成的不确定性估计缺乏零噪声基准，因为长文本基准常依赖易错标签而非确定性真值，导致评估受标签不完美影响严重。

Method: 构建SALT基准，包含6个程序化生成任务，具有单一确定性长文本真值；基于该基准对50+LLM进行系统性分析，评估不同分辨率下的置信度指标。

Result: 1) 不同置信度函数在不同不确定性维度上表现各异；2) 置信度排名在原子级（token级）基本失效，仅在粗粒度（行级）上存在区分性；3) 通过原子级干预发现未来错误的两个可分离驱动因素；4) 推理（CoT或训练内化）提升准确性但损害置信度排名质量。

Conclusion: SALT基准为细粒度不确定性评估提供了可靠平台，研究发现对需要可靠错误识别与缓解的风险关键型应用有直接影响。

Abstract: As LLMs generate increasingly long outputs, effective uncertainty estimation must identify errors at fine-grained levels rather than discard entire responses. While such methods exist, evaluating uncertainty at any resolution (token to an entire generation) is challenging and highly sensitive to label imperfections, making zero-noise benchmarks essential; yet, long-form generation benchmarks tend to rely on fallible labels rather than deterministic ground truth. We introduce Single-answer Atomic Long-form Target (SALT), a benchmark of six procedurally generated tasks with single deterministic long textual ground truths, enabling unit-level evaluation of correctness, calibration, and ranking without external judges. Equipped with SALT, our analysis of 50+ LLMs reveals key insights: We identify which confidence functions dominate each uncertainty aspect and show that confidence ranking largely breaks at atomic resolution, even when clearer separability emerges at coarser line-level units. SALT further enables controlled atom-level interventions throughout generation, revealing two separable drivers of future errors: propagation from corrupted prefixes, dominated by global context correctness, and bounded degradation from increasing answer-context length. Finally, we demonstrate that reasoning, via Chain-of-Thought prompting or internalized through training, introduces a trade-off, improving accuracy while degrading confidence ranking. These findings directly impact risk-critical applications requiring reliable error identification and mitigation.

</details>


### [466] [Explainable AI for Screening Abuse-Related Trauma in Bangladeshi Children: A Training-Free Multimodal Framework Evaluated on Noise-Aware Synthetic Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04010)
*Salma Hoque Talukdar Koli,Fahima Haque Talukder Jely*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了ShishuRaksha AI框架，融合问卷、孟加拉语文本、绘画特征和面部情感四种筛查模式，用于孟加拉国儿童虐待相关心理创伤的早期筛查。由于缺乏真实临床数据集，研究构建了含噪声的合成基准（500例），在排除面部通道后使用树集成代理模型进行评估，融合模型AUC达0.874，显著优于仅使用SDQ基线的0.756。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 孟加拉国心理健康专业人员极度匮乏（每10万人仅1.17名），且缺乏孟加拉语、文化适应的儿童虐待心理创伤早期筛查工具。

Method: 提出ShishuRaksha AI框架，融合四种筛查模式（SDQ/CPSS问卷、孟加拉语叙述文本、房树人绘画特征、面部情感），采用无训练、临床加权的跨模态注意力机制及单模态覆盖规则。风险评分通过临床加权、基于扰动的可加性归因进行解释，生成双语报告并链接儿童保护服务。由于无法收集真实临床数据，构建了含四层噪声的合成基准（500例），使用树集成代理模型（排除面部通道）进行5折分层交叉验证评估。

Result: 融合模型AUC为0.874 [0.834-0.908]，显著优于SDQ基线模型的0.756 [0.705-0.803]。进行了消融、操作点、子组和校准分析。

Conclusion: 本研究是一项可行性研究和设计贡献，旨在低资源环境下实现可伦理部署的儿童保护筛查。同时公开了局限性：仅使用合成数据、无独立测试集、文本特征循环问题、城乡子组差距。

Abstract: Bangladesh has an estimated 1.17 mental-health professionals per 100,000 population and only six child psychiatrists nationwide. No Bengali-language, culturally adapted tool exists for early screening of abuse-related psychological trauma in children. We present ShishuRaksha AI, a decision-support (not diagnostic) framework that fuses four screening modalities: validated questionnaires (SDQ, CPSS), Bengali narrative text, House-Tree-Person (HTP) drawing features, and facial affect. The fusion is training-free and clinically weighted, uses cross-modal attention, and includes a single-modality override rule. Every risk score is explained through clinically weighted, perturbation-based additive attribution and rendered as a bilingual (Bangla/English) report with referral routing to national child-protection services (OCC, DSS, NMHH) under the Children Act 2013. No clinical dataset of abused children can be collected ethically at this stage, so we introduce a noise-aware synthetic benchmark (500 cases, 116 positive [23.2%], four deliberate noise layers, literature-grounded HTP priors) and evaluate tree-ensemble surrogates of the fusion design (facial channel excluded) under 5-fold stratified cross-validation. The fused model reaches an AUC of 0.874 [0.834-0.908], against 0.756 [0.705-0.803] for an SDQ-only baseline, with ablation, operating-point, subgroup, and calibration analyses. We state all limitations openly, including synthetic-only data, no held-out set, text-feature circularity, and an urban-rural subgroup gap. This work is a feasibility study and a design contribution toward ethically deployable child-protection screening in low-resource settings.

</details>


### [467] [DSpark: Confidence-Scheduled Speculative Decoding with Semi-Autoregressive Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05147)
*Xin Cheng,Xingkai Yu,Chenze Shao,Jiashi Li,Yunfan Xiong,Yi Qian,Jiaqi Zhu,Shirong Ma,Xiaokang Zhang,Jiasheng Ye,Qinyu Chen,Chengqi Deng,Jiping Yu,Damai Dai,Zhengyan Zhang,Yixuan Wei,Yixuan Tan,Wenkai Yang,Runxin Xu,Yu Wu,Zhean Xu,Xuanyu Wang,Muyang Chen,Rui Tian,Xiao Bi,Zhewen Hao,Shaoyuan Chen,Huanqi Cao,Wentao Zhang,Anyi Xu,Huishuai Zhang,Dongyan Zhao,Wenfeng Liang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: DSpark是一种推测解码框架，通过半自回归架构和自适应负载感知验证机制，在保持高质量并行生成的同时显著提升LLM推理吞吐量，在DeepSeek-V4生产系统中实现用户生成速度60-85%的提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有并行推测解码方法因缺乏token间依赖导致接受率快速衰减，且无差别验证长块浪费批处理容量，在高并发系统中吞吐量严重下降。

Method: 提出DSpark框架：(1) 半自回归架构——并行骨干网络结合轻量级顺序模块，引入块内依赖建模缓解后缀衰减；(2) 置信度调度验证——基于前缀存活概率和引擎吞吐量特征动态调整每个请求的验证长度。

Result: 在离线基准测试中，接受长度显著优于现有自回归和并行草稿方法；在DeepSeek-V4生产系统在线流量下，等同吞吐量时用户生成速度提升60-85%，且在严格交互约束下实现此前不可达的性能层级。

Conclusion: DSpark成功缓解了验证浪费问题，推动了服务系统的帕累托前沿，使高性能并行推测解码在生产环境中成为可行。

Abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates Large Language Model (LLM) inference by decoupling draft generation from target verification. While recent parallel drafters efficiently propose long token sequences in a single forward pass, they suffer from rapid acceptance decay due to a lack of inter-token dependencies. Furthermore, indiscriminately verifying these extended blocks wastes critical batch capacity on tokens with high rejection risks, severely degrading throughput in high-concurrency serving systems. We introduce DSpark, a speculative decoding framework that unifies high-throughput parallel generation with adaptive, load-aware verification. To maintain draft quality, DSpark utilizes a semi-autoregressive architecture, coupling a parallel backbone with a lightweight sequential module, to introduce intra-block dependency modeling and mitigate suffix decay. To optimize system efficiency, DSpark employs confidence-scheduled verification, dynamically tailoring the verification length for each request based on estimated prefix survival probabilities and engine-specific throughput profiles. On offline benchmarks across diverse domains, DSpark substantially improves the accepted length over state-of-the-art autoregressive and parallel drafters. When deployed within the DeepSeek-V4 serving system under live user traffic, DSpark successfully mitigates verification waste. Compared to the established production baseline (MTP-1), DSpark accelerates per-user generation speeds by 60 to 85 percent at matched throughput levels. More importantly, by preventing severe throughput degradation under strict interactivity constraints, it enables performance tiers that were previously unattainable, shifting the Pareto frontier of our serving system.

</details>


### [468] [LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05391)
*Jacky Kwok,Shulu Li,Pranav Atreya,Yuejiang Liu,Yixing Jiang,Chelsea Finn,Marco Pavone,Ion Stoica,Azalia Mirhoseini*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出LLM-as-a-Verifier框架，利用连续得分概率分布实现可扩展的验证能力，在多个基准上达到SOTA，并可应用于RL训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM能力提升主要依赖预训练、后训练和测试时计算的扩展，但验证能力（判断解决方案正确性）尚未被充分探索作为可扩展的维度。

Method: 提出LLM-as-a-Verifier框架，通过计算评分token logits分布的期望生成连续分数，而非离散分数。支持沿三个维度扩展：评分粒度、重复评估、标准分解。同时提出基于连续分数的成本高效排序算法。

Result: 在Terminal-Bench V2 (86.5%)、SWE-Bench Verified (78.2%)、RoboRewardBench (87.4%)、MedAgentBench (73.3%)达到SOTA，并能提升SAC和GRPO的样本效率。

Conclusion: 验证能力可作为LLM扩展的新维度，连续概率评分框架比离散评分更有效，且验证信号可迁移至RL任务提升样本效率。

Abstract: Scaling pre-training, post-training, and test-time compute have become the central paradigms for improving the capabilities of LLMs. In this work, we identify verification, the ability to determine the correctness of a solution, as a new scaling axis. To unlock this and demonstrate its effectiveness, we introduce LLM-as-a-Verifier, a general-purpose verification framework that provides fine-grained feedback for agentic tasks without requiring additional training. Unlike standard LM judges that prompt LLMs to produce discrete scores for candidate solutions, LLM-as-a-Verifier computes the expectation over the distribution of scoring token logits to generate continuous scores. This probabilistic formulation enables verification to scale along multiple dimensions: (1) score granularity, (2) repeated evaluation, and (3) criteria decomposition. In particular, we show that scaling the scoring granularity leads to better separation between positive and negative solutions, resulting in more calibrated comparisons. Moreover, scaling repeated evaluation and criteria decomposition consistently lead to additional gains in verification accuracy through variance and complexity reduction. We further introduce a cost-efficient ranking algorithm for selecting the best solution among candidates using the verifier's continuous scores. LLM-as-a-Verifier achieves state-of-the-art performance on Terminal-Bench V2 (86.5%), SWE-Bench Verified (78.2%), RoboRewardBench (87.4%), and MedAgentBench (73.3%). Beyond verification, the fine-grained signals from LLM-as-a-Verifier can also serve as a proxy for estimating task progress. We build an extension for Claude Code, enabling developers to monitor and improve their own agentic systems. Finally, we show that LLM-as-a-Verifier can provide dense feedback for RL, improving the sample efficiency of SAC and GRPO on robotics and mathematical reasoning benchmarks.

</details>


### [469] [iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02542)
*Yuan Zhang,Jingfei Ni,Guanchen Lu,Shiqi Zhang,Qingshan Xu,Chi Liu,Xin Nie,Wenjie Xu,Lin Gao,Zhiyuan Cheng,Mingxin Zhou,Jiajia Wu,Diyuan Liu,Jia Pan,Chao Ji*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni，一个统一的多模态基础模型，将视觉、语言和动作建模集成在单一框架中，通过共享多头自注意力和脑-小脑协作设计，实现从指令理解到动作生成的端到端控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通常将视觉语言推理、视频世界建模和动作生成分离为串联管道，导致接口瓶颈和预测误差累积，缺乏统一的联合建模框架。

Method: 提出单一Omni框架，包含视觉语言模型（VLM）和视频生成模型（VGM）作为"大脑"负责高层理解与规划，动作生成模型（AGM）作为"小脑"负责低层动作执行；三者通过共享多头自注意力通信。采用四阶段渐进训练策略，结合动作标注/无标注的示范视频和多种多模态数据。

Result: 构建了包含人类示范和机器人交互数据的综合数据集，通过四阶段训练实现了VLM、VGM和AGM的联合优化，最终模型具备理解指令、预测未来状态并生成可执行动作序列的能力。

Conclusion: 统一的脑-小脑协作架构能有效避免级联管道的误差累积，实现从高层语义理解到低层动作生成的无缝衔接，为通用具身智能体提供了一个有前景的范式。

Abstract: General-purpose embodied agents must understand multimodal instructions, anticipate how their environment will evolve, and produce precise control actions over extended horizons. Existing approaches typically specialize in visual-language reasoning, video-based world modeling, or action generation, while cascaded pipelines that first synthesize future observations and then infer actions can introduce interface bottlenecks and compound prediction errors. We present iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni, a unified multimodal foundation model that jointly models vision(videos and images), language, and action within a single Omni framework. Its modality-specific visual-language, video-generation, and action-generation components communicate through shared multimodal self-attention. This design establishes brain-cerebellum collaboration: the vision-language modeland video generation model form a high-level brain for instruction understanding, task planning, progress tracking, and future visual-state prediction, whereas the action generation modelserves as a low-level cerebellum that directly converts planned subgoals and shared multimodal context into executable action chunks. To develop these capabilities, we combine action-annotated and action-free embodied videos from human demonstrations and robot interactions with embodied reasoning, embodied perception, and general-purpose image-text data to construct a comprehensive dataset. We further adopt a four-stage strategy that progressively trains the VLM, VGM, and AGM before jointly fine-tuning the complete model.

</details>


### [470] [Efficient bias mitigation in T2I diffusion models using Concept Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03397)
*Mansi,Avinash Kori,Francesco Leofante*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: CO-ALIGN通过对齐文本编码器和去噪器中的概念本体，在保持生成质量的同时大幅减少扩散模型的偏差，提升公平性30%、图像质量ΔFID=11.4，并减少88%的语义不连贯输出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的文本到图像扩散模型常带有训练数据中的有害偏差，而现有的偏差缓解方法要么只干预文本编码器，要么提供推理时引导，往往导致生成结果语义不连贯。为此，本文提出基于概念图对齐的新方法。

Method: 提出CO-ALIGN方法，基于概念本体对齐，在文本编码器和去噪器内部对齐概念，支持文本编码器、去噪器以及联合文本-去噪器本体对齐三种范式。

Result: 公平性提升30%，图像质量ΔFID=11.4，图像保真度提升2.8%，语义不连贯输出减少88%。此外，对齐的内部本体还能增强概念遗忘的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: CO-ALIGN能有效减少扩散模型偏差并保持生成完整性，且对齐的内部本体对下游任务（如概念遗忘）也有正面作用。

Abstract: Text-to-Image diffusion models often propagate harmful bias inherited from the training data. Existing bias mitigation techniques typically intervene only at the text encoder or provide inference-time guidance, often leading to generations that collapse into semantically incoherent outputs. To address these limitations, we introduce CO-ALIGN (Concept Ontology Alignment), a novel bias mitigation approach based on concept-graph alignment that operates on the model's internal concept ontology. By aligning concepts within the text encoder and denoiser, CO-ALIGN achieves substantial bias reduction while preserving generative integrity. We demonstrate the effectiveness of concept-graph alignment across three paradigms: text-encoders, denoisers and joint text-denoiser ontology alignment. CO-ALIGN outperforms the state of the art, improving fairness by $30\%$, $ΔFID=11.4$ in image quality, $2.8\%$ in image fidelity, all while reducing semantically incoherent outputs by $88\%$. Beyond bias mitigation, we show that CO-ALIGN benefits other downstream tasks as well. In particular, our experiments demonstrate that better-aligned internal ontologies enhance concept unlearning robustness across multiple unlearning techniques.

</details>


### [471] [FM-ChangeNet: Learning Change through Pathwise Feature Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04750)
*Roie Kazoom,George Leifman,Genady Beryozkin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: FM-ChangeNet 提出了一种基于路径监督的遥感变化检测方法，通过构建连续特征空间中的时间条件速度场来建模双时相图像间的变换轨迹，提供更密集的监督信号，从而提升变化检测的鲁棒性和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的端点式变化检测仅比较前后时相的特征，忽略了中间变化过程，导致监督信号稀疏且易受光照、配准误差等干扰。作者希望通过引入连续路径约束来捕获时序演化的内在结构。

Method: 构建中间隐状态并学习时间条件速度场 $\hat{v}_θ(z_t,t)$；采用层级多尺度架构，包含跨时相对齐、时间条件粗到细流解码；联合优化流监督、轨迹一致性、空间正则化和分割损失。

Result: 在遥感基准数据集上取得了当前最优性能，生成的变化表征更加结构化且鲁棒，速度场幅度可作为空间变化线索以区分真实变化与光照/错位等干扰。

Conclusion: 路径监督的连续传输框架比静态端点比较提供了更稠密、歧义更少的监督信号，能够显式捕获时序演化，同时速度场本身具有可解释性，有助于抑制噪声影响。

Abstract: We present FM-ChangeNet, a pathwise-supervised framework for change detection that reformulates bi-temporal reasoning as continuous transport in feature space rather than static endpoint comparison. Given encoded pre and post-temporal representations, we construct intermediate latent states and learn a time-conditioned velocity field $\hat{v}_θ(z_t,t)$ along the transformation trajectory. This pathwise formulation constrains the predictor over a continuum of intermediate states, providing a denser and less ambiguous supervision signal than conventional endpoint-only segmentation and enabling the model to capture temporal evolution explicitly. The learned velocity field is not only a transport mechanism but also an interpretable representation of change: its magnitude serves as a spatially localized change cue that helps distinguish true structural variation from nuisance effects such as illumination shifts and spatial misalignment. We develop a hierarchical multi-scale architecture with cross-temporal alignment, time-conditioned coarse-to-fine flow decoding, and a unified objective that couples flow supervision, trajectory consistency, spatial regularization, and segmentation loss. Experiments on remote sensing benchmarks show that the proposed framework produces more structured and robust change representations while achieving state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [472] [ASSEMCAD: Production-Ready CAD Assembly Generation from Natural Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05123)
*Yurui Dong,Shu Zou,Siqi Li,Nianchen Deng,Hongbin Zhou,Xuemeng Yang,Pinlong Cai,Licheng Wen,Xinyu Cai,Botian Shi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: AssemCAD提出了一种基于公理框架的方法，从自然语言生成生产就绪的机械装配体。它通过构建包含类型化零件、几何端口、可执行配合和工程公理的装配规范，结合端口-配合库和参数化组件工厂，实现了比传统代码生成基线更高的装配保真度和物理有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Text-to-CAD方法主要针对单个零件生成，无法处理多组件装配体中所需的协调推理、功能接口、装配关系、工程原理和物理一致性，直接生成CAD代码不足以构建机械有效且可复用的装配体。

Method: 1) 构建公理化装配规范（Assembly Specification），包含类型化零件、几何端口、可执行配合和工程公理；2) 开发基于端口和配合的CAD装配库，通过确定性配合变换执行符号装配关系，并用B-Rep几何证据验证接口；3) 支持按需合成可复用的参数化组件工厂。

Result: 在AssemBench基准上，AssemCAD在装配保持率和物理有效性方面显著优于基于代码生成的CAD基线，并能泛化到不同的基础模型骨干。

Conclusion: 通过将公理驱动的装配推理与确定性几何执行相结合，AssemCAD将Text-to-CAD从孤立零件生成扩展到生产就绪的机械装配设计。

Abstract: Recent advances in large language models and programmatic CAD have significantly improved Text-to-CAD generation for individual parts. However, production-ready mechanical assembly generation remains largely unsolved. Unlike single-part modeling, assemblies require coordinated reasoning over multiple components, functional interfaces, assembly relations, engineering principles, and physical consistency. Consequently, directly generating executable CAD code is insufficient for constructing mechanically valid and reusable assemblies. We present AssemCAD, an axiom-grounded framework for production-ready CAD assembly generation from natural language. Instead of representing an assembly as monolithic CAD code, AssemCAD first constructs an axiomatic Assembly Specification consisting of typed parts, geometry-backed ports, executable mates, and engineering axioms. Each assembly relation is explicitly grounded in one or more engineering principles, making the resulting specification interpretable, reusable, and verifiable. To realize this specification, AssemCAD introduces a port- and mate-based CAD assembly library that executes symbolic assembly relations through deterministic mate transformations and validates declared interfaces using concrete B-Rep geometric evidence. Built on this representation and library, AssemCAD further supports on-demand synthesis of reusable parametric component factories for both standard and open-world geometries. Experiments on AssemBench show that AssemCAD substantially improves assembly preservation and physical validity over code-centric CAD generation baselines, while generalizing across different foundation-model backbones. By combining axiom-grounded assembly reasoning with deterministic geometric execution, AssemCAD extends Text-to-CAD from isolated part generation toward production-ready mechanical assembly design.

</details>
